description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a mix of white and dark exterior walls. The structure features multiple balconies and terraces, with railings and open spaces on the upper floor. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered garage, a small lawn area, and a paved patio with some greenery. The main entrance is accessible from a front porch, and the overall design emphasizes geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces. The building is surrounded by a combination of grass, stone, and paved surfaces, integrating it into an urban neighborhood context.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roof bungalow with large windows, balconies, a garage, and a mix of white and dark exterior walls, set within a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building mass, upper floor balconies, and a small detached structure to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, front porch, and a wide balcony above, with visible lawn and paved driveway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage with a car, stone base, and additional greenery along the facade.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the paved patio, garage entrance, and a secondary structure, with visible terrace and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows on all facades
